sample_raw_entries.desc: Can Discard Any Item
Enemy Treasure Is Always Random
Shops Charge Nothing
Rest In Peace (Die Instantly During Battle)
Necresaro Casts "BOUNCE" During Battle
You Get 999 HP When You Get Hurt & 999 MP When You Use Magic
When You Buy Something, You Get 99,999 Gold
Good Stat Level Raises, Certain Characters
Good Stat Level Raises Some Characters[Also A Bit
In Towns You Can Walkthrough Trees
You Can Walkthrough Everything But Grass
You Can Walkthrough Everything
Never Get Randomly Attacked!
Any Damage To A Monster Will Defeat It, Even Bosses
Always Get A Treasure Chest After Winning A Battle
Always Get A Treasure Chest After Winning A Battle
Get Double The Experience From A Battle!
Get Double The Gold From A Battle!
Always Get Just Over 1,000,000 EXP. And 4,000 GP After Any Battle
All Party Members Always Inflict "Terrific Blows"
Any Character That's Not AI Controlled And Is Told To Fight Will Inflict A Terrible Blow Everytime For 10 Times The Normal Damage
AI Controlled Characters That Choose To Fight Will Inflict A Terrible Blow Everytime For 10 Times The Normal Damag
Any Character That's Not AI Controlled And Is Told To Fight Will Trigger An Earthquake That Defeats All Enemies
The Sage's Stone Behaves Like The "Dew of The World Tree" In Battle, Which Restores All Fighting Party Members' To Maximum HP
When The Sword of Malice Is Used In Battle, It Summons Taloon's Merchant Army To Attack The Selected Group
